allow: Bash(rm -f AGENTS.md astro.config.mjs CHANGELOG.md CLAUDE.md create-emdash-0.1.0.tgz emdash-env.d.ts package.json tsconfig.json)
Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); d.setdefault\('pnpm', {}\)['onlyBuiltDependencies'] = ['msw']; print\(json.dumps\(d, indent=2\)\)")

Bash(python3 -c " import sys, json d = json.load\(sys.stdin\) d['scripts']['test'] = 'vitest' d['scripts']['test:run'] = 'vitest run' d['scripts']['test:coverage'] = 'vitest run --coverage' print\(json.dumps\(d, indent='\\t'\)\) ")
Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); [print\(c.get\('name','?'\), c.get\('type','?'\)\) for c in d.get\('collections',[]\)]")

Bash(python3 -c " import sys, json d = json.load\(sys.stdin\) d.setdefault\('pnpm', {}\).setdefault\('onlyBuiltDependencies', []\) if 'better-sqlite3' not in d['pnpm']['onlyBuiltDependencies']: d['pnpm']['onlyBuiltDependencies'].append\('better-sqlite3'\) print\(json.dumps\(d, indent='\\t'\)\) ")
